kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: If 13 coins does not go with Southgate, then 5 coins goes with Aldric.
Exactly one of Aldric, Matilda, and the artisan with 11 coins belongs to the Gate Ward.
7 coins goes with none of Aldric, Beatrix, or Wulfric.
Cedric, Eastcheap, and 11 coins belong to different artisans.
Cedric's levy is between Aldric and the artisan in Kingsford.
Wulfric's levy is higher than both the artisan in Kingsford and the artisan in Oldwall.
Between Matilda and 9 coins, one goes with Oldwall and the other with Southgate.
Aldric does not go with 5 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
